RegLoan Bank — Form W-2 Wage and Tax Statement Document W2-0001 Page 1 of 1 Employee: John Ito SSN: TKN-244444 Box Description Amount ($) 1 Wages, tips, other comp. 116,013 2 Federal income tax withheld 23,856 3 Social security wages 140,363 4 Social security tax withheld 7,462 5 Medicare wages and tips 42,901 6 Medicare tax withheld 1,607
